data.body: FRAC-23 implementation complete — 4 commits on frac-23-apply-home (ccfd811 lattice catchup, 9b8d4c3 Home.tsx, 9be41d1 Hero pairing+skip-nav, 0085134 Hero input/mirror/subtitle). Migrated 1 site in Home.tsx (FRAC-42 pairing at L25) and 6 sites in Hero.tsx (3 FRAC-42 pairing at L120/L133/L240 + 1 skip-nav .text-eyebrow at L133 + 1 input .text-control at L194 + 1 mirror .text-control at L199 + 1 result-subtitle .text-meta at L278). GAP at Home.tsx:35 deferred per plan; audit-gaps.md:34-38 entry stands. Tests: typecheck clean; pnpm test shows exactly the 4 documented baselines (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). Mobile 375px browser verification: did not run live dev server (no Playwright/browser MCP in this sub-agent's capacity). Compiled CSS verified instead — pnpm build succeeded; dist/assets/index-DDt8oF3e.css contains .text-control, .text-display, .text-eyebrow, .text-foreground, .text-label, .text-meta, so all utilities the migration depends on resolve. Grep-verified no raw text-white/text-black/text-gray-*/text-house-*/bg-house-* in either file; commented HouseBannerGrid import at Home.tsx:3-5 preserved verbatim. Recommend orchestrator run the 375px browser checklist (skip-nav pop, search input mixed-case + iOS no-zoom, caret tracking on a/abc/abcdef, result subtitle .text-meta rendering) before transitioning to done.

VERDICT: PASS Reviewed cold against plan at .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF06P70NPWYS3B05YT17G.md. Walked the 7 plan-locked edits against current Home.tsx + Hero.tsx, walked the audit doc row by row to confirm every EXACT no-op and GAP deferral was honored, ran the grep audit suite, and verified the diff scope matches the plan's commit strategy. The 7 plan-locked edits: - [PASS] Home.tsx:25 — pairing added: 'bg-background text-foreground px-[4.5%] py-40 md:py-60' - [PASS] Hero.tsx:120 — pairing added: '… overflow-hidden bg-background text-foreground' - [PASS] Hero.tsx:133 — pairing + .text-eyebrow swap: 'flex flex-col gap-1 bg-background text-foreground border border-foreground p-3 text-eyebrow' (no leftover font-mono/text-xs/uppercase/tracking-wider) - [PASS] Hero.tsx:194 — input migrated text-label → text-control - [PASS] Hero.tsx:202 — mirror span migrated text-label → text-control (note: landed on L202 per the className attribute line in this formatting, as anticipated by the plan) - [PASS] Hero.tsx:240 — listbox pairing added: 'w-full bg-background/95 text-foreground backdrop-blur-sm border border-foreground/20 …' - [PASS] Hero.tsx:278 — result subtitle migrated to 'text-meta text-xs text-foreground/60 truncate mt-0.5' (density override preserved side-by-side per plan, mirroring L289 pattern) Deferrals/non-edits honored: - Home.tsx:35 GAP cluster verbatim ('font-mono text-sm md:text-base leading-relaxed text-foreground/80 space-y-6 uppercase font-thin' + style fontStyle:normal). 5 inline anchors at L38/47/56/65/78 untouched. scenius at L84 untouched. - Home.tsx:3-5 commented HouseBannerGrid import preserved verbatim. - Home.tsx:19
unchanged. - Hero.tsx:243 .text-meta no-op preserved. - Hero.tsx:272 .text-label no-op preserved (result title). - Hero.tsx:289 .text-eyebrow + text-[10px] density override preserved. Out-of-scope files untouched: src/index.css, DESIGN.md, .lattice/notes/audit-prompt.md, .lattice/notes/audits/home-audit.md, .lattice/notes/audit-gaps.md, Navbar, Footer, OctahedronHero, FractalCityScene, Skyline, FractalObject, FadeIn, MandelbrotIcon, MandelbrotCorners, FractalPattern, hooks. Confirmed via 'git diff --name-only frac-22-audit-home..HEAD': only 2 src files + 5 lattice state files changed (the lattice catchup commit + 3 src commits, matches plan's 4-commit strategy). Grep audit: - text-(white|black|gray-|house-) in Home.tsx + Hero.tsx → zero matches - bg-house- in Home.tsx + Hero.tsx → zero matches - text-label in Hero.tsx → only L272 (result title EXACT no-op) - text-eyebrow in Hero.tsx → exactly L133 (migrated skip-nav) + L289 (existing group label) - text-control in Hero.tsx → exactly L194 (input) + L202 (mirror) - text-meta in Hero.tsx → exactly L243 (EXACT) + L278 (new migration) Tests: typecheck=clean, tests=4 documented baseline failures only (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen) with 143 passing — no regressions. build=success; compiled CSS at dist/assets/index-DDt8oF3e.css contains .text-control, .text-display, .text-eyebrow, .text-label, .text-meta. Browser verification at 375px: not performed in review session (no browser MCP available). Per the plan's review-handoff checklist, a human/orchestrator should verify the next time the project opens locally: skip-nav focus pop at .text-eyebrow rendering (JBM uppercase weight 500 tracking 0.1em text-sm), search input typed text mixed-case at text-base, no iOS zoom on input focus, mirror span measurement tracks caret overlay across 'a'/'abc'/'abcdef' typing, listbox text-foreground paired correctly, result subtitle .text-meta + text-xs rendering. Documented gap, not a failure. Commit history: 4 logical commits (ccfd811 lattice state catchup, 9b8d4c3 Home.tsx pairing, 9be41d1 Hero pairings + skip-nav .text-eyebrow, 0085134 Hero search input + mirror .text-control + result subtitle .text-meta) — matches the plan's commit strategy exactly.
